name: of1-demo-skills
description: Turn any website into an OF1 generative-search demo on Adobe Edge Delivery Services. Ships an orchestrator plus 13 step skills.

_notes.dependencies: stardust + snowflake + impeccable live in adobe/skills@feat/eds-snowflake-da-content (stardust is built on top of impeccable). They must be published as a Claude Code plugin/marketplace before plugin-install can resolve them. Until then, of1-setup verifies presence and emits install instructions if missing.
_notes.entrypoints: of1-demo-cc is the Claude Code orchestrator. of1-demo is the SLICC variant (kept for SLICC users). Pick one to invoke based on the runtime.
